The piece highlights the urgency of adapting to a post‑employment economy.

title: 突发：OpenAI大规模重组，总裁Brockman夺权挂帅
content: OpenAI announced a sudden, large‑scale reorganization before its IPO: the ChatGPT, Codex, and API teams were merged into one product org, and Greg Brockman, the co‑founder and former president, will now lead product strategy. Nick Turley, the former “father” of ChatGPT, was moved away from consumer products, and Ashley Alexander took his place. The new structure aims to build a “Super App” combining chat, coding, and browsing tools, while the company faces steep competition from Anthropic and Google and a rapid loss of senior staff.
eventKey: openai大规模重组-总裁brockman夺权挂帅
normalizedTitle: 突发 openai大规模重组 总裁brockman夺权挂帅

title: Gaining control of every projector and camera on campus
content: The article discusses how a group gained control over every projector and camera installed across a college campus. It details the technical methods used, the vulnerabilities discovered, and the implications for campus security and privacy. The piece also highlights the responses from university IT staff and the broader conversation about securing public‑facilities equipment.

title: ChatGPT 能替你管钱了，你敢把银行账户交给它吗？ | 原文
content: OpenAI has released a new ChatGPT Pro feature that lets users connect their bank and investment accounts to the AI chatbot for personal finance management. Currently available only to U.S. Pro subscribers (US$200/month), the integration uses Plaid to link over 12,000 financial institutions, including JPMorgan, Fidelity, and Robinhood. The rollout has sparked excitement and concern over trust and privacy when entrusting money management to an AI.

content: The article explains how GPT‑Image‑2 and Seedance 2.0 combine to create realistic AI videos, from sports live‑stream re-creations to story‑board animation and game‑like footage. It discusses prompt‑engineering tricks, using Gemini for detailed video analysis, and converting 2D images into 3D models for interactive websites. title: 璀璨之星 xbatis，横扫 java 界的 ORM 来了

做Java后端的人，ORM框架选型基本逃不出这几个： MyBatis-Plus，JPA，或者干脆手写SQL。

JPA听起来很美好——全自动Mapping，实体写好就不用管了。但真到复杂查询的时候，JPQL写起来跟手写SQL差不多，还受限于ORM映射模型，调试困难…
eventKey: 璀璨之星-xbatis-java-orm
normalizedTitle: 璀璨之星 xbatis 横扫 java 界的 orm 来了

title: Lola Maria 将西班牙塔帕斯美食带到荷里活道
content: Lola Maria introduces authentic Spanish tapas to Hollywood Road, offering a selection of traditional Spanish appetizers in a conveniently located deli-style counter. The menu features a variety of fresh, seasoned ingredients and preparations, aiming to give local customers a quick taste of Spanish cuisine. This venture expands the spread of Spanish tapas beyond its typical urban centers into a broader, new neighborhood.

title: 美股下跌，通胀压力攀升加剧全球债券跌势
content: US equity markets slipped as falling bond prices weighed on sentiment. The S&P 500 fell 1.2% but ended the week slightly up 0.1%. The Dow dropped 1.1%, and the Nasdaq slid 1.5%. Meanwhile, the 10‑year Treasury yield rose to its highest level in over a year, reflecting increased inflation pressure and pushing global bonds lower.

title: 百度成立模型委员会，统筹大模型研发布局
content: 百度近日宣布成立百度模型委员会（BMC），成员主要是对大模型有深刻理解的年轻研究员。基础模型研发部（BMU）与应用模型研发部（AMU）将直接向其汇报，BMC 全面统筹百度大模型全流程工作，推动技术与应用一体化发展。这是百度在大模型领域深化战略布局的关键一步，旨在集中优势力量…

title: SpaceXAI 合并后流失逾 50 名核心员工，预训练团队仅剩数人
content: SpaceXAI, formerly xAI, has lost more than 50 key researchers and engineers since its merger and rebranding, leaving only a handful in the pre‑training team. Departures include leaders in critical tech areas, many moving to Meta and Thinking Machine Labs. The exodus is blamed on organizational upheaval, Musk’s “extreme” work culture, unrealistic deadlines, and attractive equity liquidity. The talent drain undermines confidence in SpaceXAI’s R&D, threatening progress on its main model, Grok, and illustrating challenges of Musk‑style management in AI talent retention.

title: 从贸易到台湾问题：特朗普与习近平峰会取得了哪些成果（以及哪些未达成）
content: The Trump–Xi summit produced modest trade gains but fell short on key issues. It culminated in a revived trade agreement, easing tariffs while tightening U.S. controls on Chinese technology exports. Joint steps were taken to address intellectual property rights and market access. However, the meeting did not resolve long‑standing disputes over Taiwan, human rights, or strategic competition, leaving both sides with unfinished commitments and heightened tensions.

title: Vitalik Buterin on Human Agency in the AI Era
content: Vitalik Buterin discusses how growing technology changes human agency, drawing on his experience building Ethereum. He explains “sanctuary technology” that enhances safety without limiting freedom, warns against overreliance on AI, and stresses the importance of active, independent thinking as AI advances. The interview covers his evolving worldview, creativity, community, and the challenge of staying intentional in a world that increasingly nudges people toward autopilot.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Vitalik Buterin, Sophia Dew, Binji Pande)

title: 特朗普和习近平究竟取得了什么成果？
content: Trump and Xi’s meetings produced several high‑level agreements, including cooperation on climate policy, a U.S. military–China defense dialogue framework, and a framework for trade dispute resolution. They also discussed joint investment initiatives in sustainable infrastructure and science, though many domestic concerns—such as China’s intellectual‑property conduct and Taiwan—remained unresolved. Overall, the talks yielded symbolic commitments rather than substantive policy breakthroughs.
eventKey: 特朗普和习近平究竟取得了什么成果
normalizedTitle: 特朗普和习近平究竟取得了什么成果

title: Building a general-purpose accessibility agent—and what we learned in the process
content: GitHub is testing a general‑purpose accessibility agent to answer questions in Copilot and automatically fix simple accessibility issues in front‑end code. It has reviewed 3,535 PRs with a 68% resolution rate, targeting common problems like clear structure, proper naming, announcement awareness, text alternatives, and logical focus order. The agent uses a two‑sub‑agent design (passive reviewer and active implementer) with template schemas and linear steps to reduce token use and ensure accuracy. It escalates complex or high‑risk patterns to human teams and relies on manually logged accessibility issues for training.
eventKey: building-general-purpose-accessibility-agent—and-what-learned
normalizedTitle: building a general-purpose accessibility agent—and what we learned in the process
